candidate.label: hair
candidate.reason: teacher judgment does not authorize a proposal

correction.rationale: Mask boundary already tightly follows visible hair edges with no missing area or neighbor contamination; no correction needed.

judgment.evidence: Mask coverage matches the visible hair extent in the source crop with correct side (hair falls toward viewer's left, character's proper side) and no contamination of neighboring face/neck/clothing regions; minor boundary softness near flyaway strands is acceptable.

observations.contour: Contour line hugs hairline at forehead, around ear, and along the long strand edge down to shoulder; a couple of thin flyaway hairs at top-right are captured with jagged but plausible boundary.
observations.full_context: Woman in side profile wearing white tank top; hair drapes down left side of head/neck and behind ear, consistent with crop target for hair.
observations.mask: White silhouette closely matches hair shape: crown, side-swept portion in front of ear, and long strand down back/shoulder; ear and face area correctly excluded.
observations.neighbor_overlap: No overlap onto face, neck, ear, or tank top straps; boundary respects skin/hair separation cleanly.
observations.overlay: Red overlay aligns well with hair region, no bleed into face, neck, or tank top; flyaway wisps at top are included in the red region.
observations.source_crop: Long straight dark brown hair parted center, falling past ear and down over shoulder to about collarbone level, with a few flyaway strands at crown.
